examples: The eluate can be used repeatedly or by other methods.
The proportions of flavin, non-heme iron and labile sulphide in the eluate was found to be 1: (8~10) :10.
On SDS-polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis (SDS-PAGE)the eluate from the column with the McAb coupled showed a single band, corresponding to the elution peak.
